name: OpenClaw Raw Memory System
description: Raw conversation backup system for OpenClaw agents — zero token cost, full fidelity, searchable.

raw-backup.description: Automatically backup all agent conversations to Markdown files

raw-memory-search.description: Search raw conversation memory when recall is incomplete

RAW_MEMORY_USER_LABEL.description: Display label for user messages (default: User)

RAW_MEMORY_TIMEZONE.description: IANA timezone for date formatting (default: system timezone)
